3124460.name: September Fall - Loneliness
3124460.description:
September Fall - Loneliness is a psychological horror game.

Story
In this game, you will play as a husband who begins a journey to find his wife. She is now on a deserted island where survival battles are about to take place. On this island, it's not just you and your wife, but also others with the same goal: to obtain the powerful stone, a treasure that can change their lives forever.

Gameplay
This game is a first-person with walking simulator, exploring, conversation and fighting. The game lasts from 2 to 2.5 hours depending on the player.
3124460.supported_languages:
英语*, 越南语, 日语, 韩语, 俄语, 简体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
